videos.headline: Kalel Mullings sends the Big House into a frenzy with a 53-yard TD
videos.description: Kalel Mullings rumbles ahead for a 53-yard touchdown to open the scoring for Michigan against USC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Kalel Mullings sends the Big House into a frenzy with a 53-yard TD) 2024/9/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Donovan Edwards finds the crease for a 41-yard TD
videos.description: Donovan Edwards turns on the jets for a 41-yard Michigan touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Donovan Edwards finds the crease for a 41-yard TD) 2024/9/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: USC forces a fumble to set up a go-ahead TD
videos.description: After USC hits Donovan Edwards with a 'Peanut Punch' to force a fumble, Ja'Kobi Lane gives them the lead with a leaping TD catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (USC forces a fumble to set up a go-ahead TD) 2024/9/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mullings delivers massive run, go-ahead TD in final minute
videos.description: Kalel Mullings rips off a massive 63-yard run to set himself up for a last-minute go-ahead TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Mullings delivers massive run, go-ahead TD in final minute) 2024/9/21 ESHEET
